scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Fleet Menu Bar
commands.description: Live MikroTik fleet cockpit in the menu bar — health, activity, alerts

commands.name: overview
commands.title: Overview
commands.description: Tool-call volume, latency, error rate and risk at a glance

commands.name: devices
commands.title: Devices
commands.description: Router connectivity, system health (CPU/MEM/DISK) and SSH pool

commands.name: clients
commands.title: Clients
commands.description: LAN devices on a router — live traffic, block/allow, pin IP, rate limits

commands.name: packets
commands.title: Packet Capture
commands.description: Live decoded TZSP packet capture — protocols, talkers, pcap export

commands.name: radius-um
commands.title: RADIUS & UM
commands.description: RADIUS client and User Manager — users, profiles, limitations, NAS, sessions

commands.name: topology
commands.title: Topology
commands.description: Configured devices and discovered Layer-2 neighbours (MNDP/CDP/LLDP)

commands.name: snapshots
commands.title: Snapshots
commands.description: Browse stored config snapshots and time-travel diff any two

commands.name: drift
commands.title: Drift Guard
commands.description: Golden config baselines and live drift detection per device

commands.name: change-plan
commands.title: Change Plan
commands.description: Dry-run intended RouterOS commands — risk-scored, safely ordered

commands.name: s3-backups
commands.title: S3 Backups
commands.description: List, download and delete S3 backup objects

commands.name: backups
commands.title: Backups
commands.description: Local config vault — create, download, rename, restore, delete

commands.name: modules
commands.title: Modules
commands.description: Enable/disable tool modules — curate the exposed MCP surface

commands.name: config
commands.title: Config
commands.description: Effective configuration, safe editor, version history and field guide

commands.name: memory
commands.title: Memory
commands.description: Knowledge graph — entities, relations, observations and activity

commands.name: feed
commands.title: Live Feed
commands.description: Every MCP tool call in real time (WebSocket, SSE fallback)

commands.name: monitor-devices
commands.title: Monitor Devices
commands.description: Background health check that notifies when a router goes offline or comes back online

preferences.name: dashboardUrl
preferences.title: Dashboard URL
preferences.description: Base URL of the MikroTik MCP observability dashboard (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9090)

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Access Token
preferences.description: Bearer token if the dashboard is token-gated (leave empty otherwise)
